q: What is the most interesting thing about your studies?
examiner_note:
Giám khảo muốn thấy sự nhiệt huyết và khả năng mô tả chi tiết của bạn. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Đừng chỉ nói 'everything is interesting'. Hãy chọn một khía cạnh cụ thể như: thực hành thí nghiệm, thảo luận nhóm, các dự án thực tế, hoặc một môn học cụ thể. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các tính từ mạnh như 'fascinating', 'captivating', 'intriguing' và các cụm từ như 'Hands-on experience', 'Practical application'.

band7.text: For me, the most interesting part is the group projects. We get to work with other students to solve real problems. It's not just about reading books; it's about applying what we learn to real-life situations.
band7.note: Trả lời tập trung vào một khía cạnh (group projects). Sử dụng cấu trúc 'not just... but also...' gián tiếp.

band8.text: I find the practical applications of the theories we learn in class to be the most captivating. For instance, being able to conduct experiments in the lab and see the scientific principles in action is truly fascinating and much more engaging than just sitting through lectures.
band8.note: So sánh tốt giữa thực hành và lý thuyết. Từ vựng đa dạng ('captivating', 'conduct experiments', 'sitting through lectures').

band9.text: The most intriguing aspect of my studies is the interdisciplinary nature of the curriculum. I love the way complex theories from psychology are integrated with data science to predict human behavior. This fusion of different fields keeps me intellectually stimulated and constantly challenged.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('intriguing aspect', 'interdisciplinary nature', 'integrated', 'fusion'). Diễn đạt mượt mà, logic.

v.meaning: hấp dẫn, gợi sự tò mò
v.example: The subject of quantum physics is incredibly intriguing.
The professor gave a captivating lecture on the history of art.
I found the documentary about marine biology absolutely fascinating.
The course offers plenty of hands-on experience in the lab.
The most important part of the training is the practical application of the new skills.

v.meaning: được kích thích về trí tuệ
v.example: I always feel intellectually stimulated after a good seminar.
The project takes an interdisciplinary approach to urban planning.
The curriculum is a unique fusion of traditional and modern teaching methods.

v.meaning: ngồi chịu trận (một buổi học dài/chán)
v.example: I had to sit through a three-hour lecture on auditing.
The teacher managed to engage all the students in the discussion.
It was great to see the new software in action.
Every aspect of the project was carefully planned.
The collaborative nature of the study group helped us all improve.
The new system integrates all the different databases into one.
I like this job because I'm constantly challenged to learn new things.
We have to complete a group project by the end of the term.

v.meaning: giải quyết vấn đề thực tế
v.example: The engineering department works with local companies to solve real problems.
Students are encouraged to apply for internships during the summer.
The training helped me prepare for real-life situations on the job.
Scientists conduct experiments to test their hypotheses.
Understanding basic scientific principles is essential for this course.
The story was very engaging from the first page.
This is a challenging role, but I'm ready for it.
Teaching is a difficult but very rewarding profession.
The film was very thought-provoking and raised important questions.
Traveling to different countries has been an eye-opening experience for me.
Peer discussion is often more effective than traditional lectures.
The seminar encouraged critical debate on social issues.

v.meaning: kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề
v.example: The course aims to enhance students' problem-solving skills.
Our university provides a research-led education across all disciplines.
It's important to keep up with the latest developments in technology.
The school uses innovative methods to teach languages.
Reading widely helps you broaden your perspective on the world.
Maths and science help develop strong analytical thinking.
The hub provides a space for creativity and innovation.
We went on a field trip to the local museum.
We had a guest lecture from a famous entrepreneur yesterday.
In business class, we analyze case studies of successful companies.
The teacher uses a hands-on approach to teaching science.
Active participation in class discussions is encouraged.
The university fosters a collaborative environment for research.
Studying international relations provides you with a global outlook.
The program offers specialized training in cybersecurity.
Internships are an essential part of professional growth.
The first month of the course focuses on basic skill acquisition.
University education instills a love for lifelong learning.
Intellectual curiosity is the driving force behind most scientific discoveries.
The lab is a place for discovery and innovation.
Achieving your goals brings a great sense of personal fulfillment.
College is a time for significant intellectual growth.
